purpose: Maps visible operational-evidence gaps and runtime boundary phrases to construction targets without claiming those targets are already implemented.
operational_use_threshold_rule: Operational use is a legitimate future threshold event only after runtime, evidence, audit, auth, and release-authority requirements are implemented and validated.
current_claim_rule: AETHERUS public copy must frame the current interface as a staged governance product surface and must not imply operational use already exists.

mappings.current_surface_context: Operational Evidence Required list for release-eligibility trace scenarios.
mappings.operational_use_threshold: Real input/output artifacts must be captured and bound to each runtime trace before operational use is claimed.
mappings.public_copy_rule: May appear as an operational evidence requirement; must not imply real runtime artifacts already exist.

mappings.current_surface_context: Operational Evidence Required list for idempotency trace scenarios.
mappings.operational_use_threshold: Input hashes must be generated, bound, and verifiable before operational cache or idempotency claims are made.
mappings.public_copy_rule: May appear as a hash requirement; must not imply current cryptographic input verification.

mappings.current_surface_context: Operational Evidence Required list for idempotency trace scenarios.
mappings.operational_use_threshold: Session-state hashes must be generated and verified before operational idempotency or replay claims are made.
mappings.public_copy_rule: May appear as a construction target; must not imply current session-state hash verification.

mappings.current_surface_context: Operational Evidence Required list and audit-boundary copy for trace scenarios.
mappings.operational_use_threshold: Trace storage, schema, and retention policy must be implemented before operational trace persistence is claimed.
mappings.public_copy_rule: May appear as a storage requirement; must not imply trace persistence currently exists.

mappings.current_surface_context: Operational Evidence Required list for audit and idempotency trace scenarios.
mappings.operational_use_threshold: Append-only write semantics and immutable event-chain behavior must be implemented before ledger claims are made.
mappings.public_copy_rule: May appear as an audit-ledger construction requirement; must not imply a production audit ledger exists.

mappings.current_surface_context: Operational Evidence Required list for audit and idempotency trace scenarios.
mappings.operational_use_threshold: Hash-chain verification must be implemented before trace-integrity claims are operational.
mappings.public_copy_rule: May appear as a trace-integrity requirement; must not imply current hash-chain verification.

mappings.current_surface_context: Operational Evidence Required list for release and idempotency trace scenarios.
mappings.operational_use_threshold: Server-side validation and signed result artifacts must exist before operational validation claims are made.
mappings.public_copy_rule: May appear as a backend validation requirement; must not imply current backend behavior.

mappings.current_surface_context: Operational Evidence Required list for missing-input trace scenarios.
mappings.operational_use_threshold: Backend input validation must exist before operational input-contract enforcement is claimed.
mappings.public_copy_rule: May appear as a backend validation requirement; must not imply current backend behavior.

mappings.current_surface_context: Operational Evidence Required list for safety-scan trace scenarios.
mappings.operational_use_threshold: Backend validator implementation must exist before operational safety enforcement is claimed.
mappings.public_copy_rule: May appear as a validator construction requirement; must not imply current backend enforcement.

mappings.current_surface_context: Operational Evidence Required list for adapter-failure trace scenarios.
mappings.operational_use_threshold: Backend validation logs must be captured and bound before operational validation evidence is claimed.
mappings.public_copy_rule: May appear as a log requirement; must not imply current backend logging.

mappings.current_surface_context: Operational Evidence Required list for trace attribution scenarios.
mappings.operational_use_threshold: Authenticated actor identity must be bound to trace records before operational attribution claims are made.
mappings.public_copy_rule: May appear as an identity requirement; must not imply current authenticated workflow.

mappings.current_surface_context: Operational Evidence Required list for safety-review trace scenarios.
mappings.operational_use_threshold: Reviewer identity must be authenticated and bound to trace records before operational reviewer-attribution claims are made.
mappings.public_copy_rule: May appear as a reviewer identity requirement; must not imply current authenticated review.

mappings.current_surface_context: Operational Evidence Required list for release-eligibility trace scenarios.
mappings.operational_use_threshold: Execution logs must be reproducible and replayable before operational execution evidence is claimed.
mappings.public_copy_rule: May appear as an execution-log requirement; must not imply live runtime execution.

mappings.current_surface_context: Operational Evidence Required list for safety-scan trace scenarios.
mappings.operational_use_threshold: Safety-scan logs must be reproducible before operational safety enforcement evidence is claimed.
mappings.public_copy_rule: May appear as a safety-log requirement; must not imply live safety enforcement.

mappings.current_surface_context: Operational Evidence Required list for missing-input trace scenarios.
mappings.operational_use_threshold: Missing-input logs must be reproducible before operational input-failure evidence is claimed.
mappings.public_copy_rule: May appear as a replay-log requirement; must not imply live runtime execution.

mappings.current_surface_context: Operational Evidence Required list for adapter-failure trace scenarios.
mappings.operational_use_threshold: Parser and normalization test results must be reproducible before operational adapter evidence is claimed.
mappings.public_copy_rule: May appear as a test-result requirement; must not imply live parser execution.

mappings.current_surface_context: Operational Evidence Required list for release and safety trace scenarios.
mappings.operational_use_threshold: Test result artifacts and validator reports must be present before operational release-gate evidence is claimed.
mappings.public_copy_rule: May appear as a test evidence requirement; must not imply test evidence already exists.

mappings.current_surface_context: Operational Evidence Required list across trace scenarios.
mappings.operational_use_threshold: Security and runtime-boundary reviews must be completed before operational use is claimed.
mappings.public_copy_rule: May appear as a review requirement; must not imply security review completion.

mappings.current_surface_context: Operational Evidence Required list for audit and idempotency trace scenarios.
mappings.operational_use_threshold: Storage and audit-retention governance must exist before operational audit retention is claimed.
mappings.public_copy_rule: May appear as a retention requirement; must not imply a current retention model is active.

mappings.current_surface_context: Operational Evidence Required list for safety-scan trace scenarios.
mappings.operational_use_threshold: Real contaminated artifacts must be captured and bound before operational safety-scan evidence is claimed.
mappings.public_copy_rule: May appear as an artifact requirement; must not imply real contaminated artifacts are currently processed.

mappings.current_surface_context: Operational Evidence Required list for safety-scan trace scenarios.
mappings.operational_use_threshold: Raw input/output capture must exist before operational input/output evidence is claimed.
mappings.public_copy_rule: May appear as a capture requirement; must not imply raw runtime capture currently exists.

mappings.current_surface_context: Operational Evidence Required list for missing-input trace scenarios.
mappings.operational_use_threshold: Real job-ticket artifacts must be captured and bound before operational job-ticket evidence is claimed.
mappings.public_copy_rule: May appear as an artifact requirement; must not imply real job tickets are currently processed.

mappings.current_surface_context: Operational Evidence Required list for missing-input trace scenarios.
mappings.operational_use_threshold: Real constraints-packet artifacts must be captured and bound before operational handoff evidence is claimed.
mappings.public_copy_rule: May appear as an artifact requirement; must not imply real constraints packets are currently processed.

mappings.current_surface_context: Operational Evidence Required list for missing-input trace scenarios.
mappings.operational_use_threshold: Escalation workflow records must exist before operational escalation workflow claims are made.
mappings.public_copy_rule: May appear as a workflow evidence requirement; must not imply operational escalation exists.

mappings.current_surface_context: Operational Evidence Required list for adapter-failure trace scenarios.
mappings.operational_use_threshold: Real ingress payload capture must exist before operational adapter evidence is claimed.
mappings.public_copy_rule: May appear as an ingress requirement; must not imply real ingress payload processing currently exists.

mappings.current_surface_context: Operational Evidence Required list for adapter-failure trace scenarios.
mappings.operational_use_threshold: Adapter implementation and mapping evidence must exist before operational adapter claims are made.
mappings.public_copy_rule: May appear as an adapter requirement; must not imply public NEXUS execution or adapter runtime.

mappings.current_surface_context: Operational Evidence Required list for adapter-failure trace scenarios when model output is involved.
mappings.operational_use_threshold: Model/API boundary documentation and runtime safety gates must exist before model-output operational claims are made.
mappings.public_copy_rule: May appear as conditional boundary documentation; must not imply model API calls currently occur.

mappings.current_surface_context: Operational Evidence Required list for idempotency trace scenarios.
mappings.operational_use_threshold: Cached artifact storage references must be persisted and hash-bound before operational cache-hit claims are made.
mappings.public_copy_rule: May appear as a storage-reference requirement; must not imply persistent cached artifacts currently exist.

mappings.current_surface_context: Interface fixture example evidence requirement.
mappings.operational_use_threshold: NEXUS adapter mapping must be implemented and tested before public NEXUS execution or adapter claims are made.
mappings.public_copy_rule: May appear as an adapter mapping requirement; must not imply public NEXUS execution.

mappings.current_surface_context: Runtime-execution boundary copy for static browser-side evaluation.
mappings.operational_use_threshold: Bounded runtime execution and model-execution safety gates must exist before operational runtime claims are made.
mappings.public_copy_rule: May appear only in local runtime-execution boundary context; must not define the whole product by absence.

mappings.current_surface_context: Audit-ledger boundary copy for deterministic trace scenarios.
mappings.operational_use_threshold: Persistent audit ledger, append-only semantics, hash-chain verification, and retention model must exist before production audit claims are made.
mappings.public_copy_rule: May appear only with construction targets in this backlog; must not function as a global product disclaimer.
